text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: /* My fate has yet to change.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My search for what feels like an unattainable
method to reduce the three-centimeter gap to
zero continues.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
It's the end for me if this is not possible.
Verification in progress.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
991031021222. This integer remains impossible
to delete. */
